name: Floralie of Moreton Bay Bugs
recipeIngredient: 100 g Green beans or snow peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice leeks, celery, carrots, and cabbage. Leave baby vegetables whole.
2. Cook potatoes as desired or grate them and fry.
3. Sauté bugs in a frying pan until cooked through.
4. Deglaze the pan with French dressing.
5. Sauté vegetables in a very hot frying pan with olive oil.
6. Arrange the vegetables on the bottom of the plate and place the bugs on top.
7. Serve potatoes as desired, then add bug meat on top.
8. Pour the dressing around the vegetables and bug meat (either French or butter sauce).
9. Garnish with sun-dried tomatoes and fresh dill, cherry tomato slices on top of the potato.
